dialogue.speaker: DILBERT
dialogue.text:
I’M GRUMPY TODAY,
SO DON’T EVEN TRY
TO TALK TO ME.

dialogue.speaker: DOGBERT
dialogue.text:
AND DON’T TRY TO FLATTER
ME OR GIVE ME CHOCOLATE
CAKE TO MAKE ME FEEL
BETTER.

dialogue.speaker: DILBERT
dialogue.text:
AND I GUESS I SHOULDN’T
SCRATCH YOU BEHIND THE
EARS UNTIL YOU HAVE
LITTLE LEG SPASMS.
RIGHT. NONE
OF THAT.

dialogue.speaker: DILBERT
dialogue.text:
I'M STARTING TO
WRITE AN
UNAUTHORIZED
BIOGRAPHY
ABOUT YOU.

dialogue.speaker: DOGBERT
dialogue.text:
IT'S KIND OF A “PET
AND TELL” EXPOSÉ
FULL OF STARTLING
REVELATIONS.

dialogue.speaker: DILBERT
dialogue.text:
WHO WOULD BE
STARTLED BY
MY LIFE ?

dialogue.speaker: DOGBERT
dialogue.text:
I THINK YOU
WILL BE.

dialogue.speaker: DILBERT
dialogue.text: ARE YOU REALLY GOING THROUGH WITH THE UNAUTHORIZED BIOGRAPHY OF ME ?

dialogue.speaker: DILBERT
dialogue.text: YES.

dialogue.speaker: DILBERT
dialogue.text: I’M UP TO THE PART WHERE JACKIE O’ AND LIZ TAYLOR FIGHT A DUEL FOR YOUR LOVE.

dialogue.speaker: DILBERT
dialogue.text: TRAGICALLY, NEITHER ARE AWARE THAT YOU’RE CARRYING STEVE GARVEY’S BABY !

dialogue.speaker: BACKGROUND CHARACTER
dialogue.text:
TAP
TAP
TAP

dialogue.speaker: BACKGROUND CHARACTER
dialogue.text: WELCOME TO ANOTHER MEETING OF THE “SKEPTICS SOCIETY.”

dialogue.speaker: BACKGROUND CHARACTER
dialogue.text:
TONIGHT WE WILL USE SCIENTIFIC METHODS TO DEBUNK EDNA 
GRIFFIN’S CLAIM THAT SHE CAN
TURN AN AUDIENCE INTO A
FLOCK OF CHICKENS.

dialogue.speaker: DOGBERT
dialogue.text:
WE’LL NEED
SOME VOLUN-
TEERS...

dialogue.speaker: BACKGROUND CHARACTER
dialogue.text:
MOTION TO
ADJOURN…

dialogue.speaker: BACKGROUND CHARACTER
dialogue.text:
WHOA, LOOK
AT THE TIME!

dialogue.speaker: DILBERT
dialogue.text: GOOD NEWS: THE “ALL-YOU-CAN-EAT “SALAD BAR JOINT JUST DECIDED TO STAY OPEN TWENTY-FOUR HOURS A DAY!

dialogue.speaker: DILBERT
dialogue.text: WE CAN GET A TABLE BY THE WINDOW AND LIVE THERE FOR THE REST OF OUR LIVES – FOR ONLY $5.95 APIECE !

dialogue.speaker: DILBERT
dialogue.text: HOW WOULD WE BATHE ?

dialogue.speaker: DILBERT
dialogue.text: THEY HAVE LITTLE “MOIST TOWELETTE.”

dialogue.speaker: BACKGROUND CHARACTER
dialogue.text:
DO YOU HAVE
SOMETHING FOR
A HEADACHE ?

dialogue.speaker: BACKGROUND CHARACTER
dialogue.text:
I’M PRETTY SURE
THIS WILL DO
the TRICK.

dialogue.speaker: BACKGROUND CHARACTER
dialogue.text: THANKS.

dialogue.speaker: BACKGROUND CHARACTER
dialogue.text:
I WONDER IF
HE MEANT SOME-
THING TO GET
RID OF A
HEADACHE.
NAH...

dialogue.speaker: BACKGROUND CHARACTER
dialogue.text: OPEN

dialogue.speaker: BACKGROUND CHARACTER
dialogue.text:
...AND YOU’RE
QUITE CERTAIN
THESE WILL
SHRINK TO FIT?

dialogue.speaker: BACKGROUND CHARACTER
dialogue.text:
YOU HAVE MY
WORD AS A
RETAIL SALES-
MAN.

dialogue.speaker: BACKGROUND CHARACTER
dialogue.text:
YOU WERE
TAKEN.
IN THE
WASH.

dialogue.speaker: BACKGROUND CHARACTER
dialogue.text:
NO, THEY
SHRINK
IN THE
WASH.

dialogue.speaker: BACKGROUND CHARACTER
dialogue.text:
WILL THEY
FIT NOW?

dialogue.speaker: BACKGROUND CHARACTER
dialogue.text:
LIKE A
GLOVE...

dialogue.speaker: BACKGROUND CHARACTER
dialogue.text:
LIKE A
GLOVE
WITH TWO FINGERS.

dialogue.speaker: DILBERT
dialogue.text: I'VE GOT TO GET OUT OF THIS BAD MOOD SOMEHOW.

dialogue.speaker: DILBERT
dialogue.text: I'LL HAVE TO FIND SOMEBODY INNOCENT TO BLAME…

dialogue.speaker: DOGBERT
dialogue.text: …AND MAKE HIM PLEAD FOR MY FORGIVENESS.

dialogue.speaker: DILBERT
dialogue.text: HI, DOGBERT.

dialogue.speaker: DOGBERT
dialogue.text: IS THAT SOME KIND OF AN INSULT?

dialogue.speaker: DOGBERT
dialogue.text:
I CAN FEEL THE
STATIC ELECTRICITY
BUILDING...

dialogue.speaker: BACKGROUND CHARACTER
dialogue.text: SHUFFLE

dialogue.speaker: BACKGROUND CHARACTER
dialogue.text: SHUFFLE

dialogue.speaker: BACKGROUND CHARACTER
dialogue.text: SHUFFLE

dialogue.speaker: DILBERT
dialogue.text:
I MOST CERTAINLY
WILL NOT CALL YOU
"THOR, DOG OF
THUNDER."
PREPARE TO DIE .

dialogue.speaker: DILBERT
dialogue.text:
MAYBE SINCE YOU'RE
FULL OF STATIC ELECTRIC-
ITY, YOU SHOULD
SAY "IT IS USELESS
TO BE A RESISTOR." 
HEE-HEE.

dialogue.speaker: BACKGROUND CHARACTER
dialogue.text: ZZZZZ

dialogue.speaker: DOGBERT
dialogue.text:
NOTHING ANNOYS
THE “DOG OF
THUNDER” QUITE
AS MUCH AS
NERD PUNS.

dialogue.speaker: DILBERT
dialogue.text: LET’S GO…IT’S TIME TO RENEW YOUR DOG LICENSE.

dialogue.speaker: DOGBERT
dialogue.text: I WONDER WHAT HAPPENS IF I FAIL THE WRITTEN TEST?

dialogue.speaker: DILBERT
dialogue.text: I’M SORRY, BUT IT SEEMS YOU’VE FAILED THE WRITTEN PORTION OF THE DOG LICENSE TEST.

dialogue.speaker: DOGBERT
dialogue.text: IMPOSSIBLE!

dialogue.speaker: DILBERT
dialogue.text: FOR EXAMPLE, THIS QUESTION ON “NATURAL ENEMIES”: THE CORRECT ANSWER IS “MAILMAN.” YOU WROTE-IN “FAX MACHINE.”

dialogue.speaker: DILBERT
dialogue.text: HOW’D IT GO ?

dialogue.speaker: DOGBERT
dialogue.text: THE “DEPARTMENT OF DOGS” DOES NOT KEEP UP WITH EMERGING TRENDS.

dialogue.speaker: DILBERT
dialogue.text: I THINK IT’S MY FUEL PUMP.

dialogue.speaker: BACKGROUND CHARACTER
dialogue.text: YOUR WHAT?

dialogue.speaker: DILBERT
dialogue.text:
WHAT I MEAN IS I THINK IT’S MY 
@!#* FUEL PUMP.

dialogue.speaker: BACKGROUND CHARACTER
dialogue.text: WELL, WHY DIDN’T YOU JUST #$&@* SAY SO?

dialogue.speaker: DILBERT
dialogue.text: SORRY... I FORGOT WHERE I WAS.

dialogue.speaker: DILBERT
dialogue.text: YOU KNOW, MANY GREAT MEN KEPT DIARIES.

dialogue.speaker: BACKGROUND CHARACTER
dialogue.text: NOT TO MENTION THE ENTIRE KIRK CAMERON FAN CLUB.

dialogue.speaker: DILBERT
dialogue.text: WELL, THIS WAS BOTH THERAPEUTIC AND SATISFYING.

dialogue.speaker: BACKGROUND CHARACTER
dialogue.text: SOMETIMES IT’S GOOD TO BARE YOUR SOUL LIKE THAT.

dialogue.speaker: DILBERT
dialogue.text: WHO THE HECK IS KIRK CAMERON ?

dialogue.speaker: DILBERT
dialogue.text:
I GOT A JOB AS
A SUBSTITUTE
SCHOOL TEACHER.

dialogue.speaker: DOGBERT
dialogue.text:
YOU AREN’T
QUALIFIED TO
BE A TEACHER.
YOU’RE A DOG.

dialogue.speaker: DOGBERT
dialogue.text:
LITTLE KIDS
WON’T KNOW THE
DIFFERENCE.

dialogue.speaker: DILBERT
dialogue.text:
YOU DO REMIND
ME A BIT OF MY
FOURTH GRADE
TEACHER.

dialogue.speaker: DILBERT
dialogue.text:
JUST A
COINCIDENCE?

dialogue.speaker: DILBERT
dialogue.text: CAN’T I TALK YOU OUT OF BECOMING A SUBSTITUTE TEACHER?

dialogue.speaker: DILBERT
dialogue.text: DON’T WORRY.

dialogue.speaker: DOGBERT
dialogue.text: I WON’T DAMAGE THE LITTLE TYKES.

dialogue.speaker: DOGBERT
dialogue.text: GOOD MORNING, CHILDREN. I’M MR. DOGBERT.

dialogue.speaker: DOGBERT
dialogue.text: ARE YOU FLAMMABLE?

dialogue.speaker: BACKGROUND CHARACTER
dialogue.text: JENNIFER! PUT THAT FLAME-THROWER AWAY RIGHT THIS MINUTE!

dialogue.speaker: BACKGROUND CHARACTER
dialogue.text: EUGENE! RELEASE THOSE HOSTAGES OR I SHALL BE FORCED TO FLING THIS CHALK ERASER AT YOUR HEAD!

dialogue.speaker: BACKGROUND CHARACTER
dialogue.text: IS THAT A “STINGER” MISSILE LAUNCHER ? WELL, I HOPE YOU BROUGHT ENOUGH FOR EVERYBODY !

dialogue.speaker: BACKGROUND CHARACTER
dialogue.text: I DID.

dialogue.speaker: DILBERT
dialogue.text: OKAY, CLASS... PUT YOUR WEAPONS AWAY AND OPEN YOUR TV GUIDES.

dialogue.speaker: DILBERT
dialogue.text: TIMMY, PLEASE READ ALOUD THE PASSAGE FROM "FALCON CREST" UNDER THE FRIDAY LISTINGS.

dialogue.speaker: DILBERT
dialogue.text: THERE'S GOT TO BE A BETTER WAY TO TEACH SEX EDUCATION.

dialogue.speaker: BACKGROUND CHARACTER
dialogue.text: HOW WAS YOUR FIRST DAY AS A SUBSTITUTE SCHOOL TEACHER?

dialogue.speaker: BACKGROUND CHARACTER
dialogue.text: IMAGINE FEELING COMPLETELY POWER- LESS... LIKE A MARBLE STATUE...

dialogue.speaker: BACKGROUND CHARACTER
dialogue.text: GOSH... THAT SOUNDS PRETTY BAD.

dialogue.speaker: BACKGROUND CHARACTER
dialogue.text: NOW IMAGINE THE BIGGEST FLOCK OF PIGEONS YOU EVER SAW...

dialogue.speaker: DILBERT
dialogue.text: I THINK I’M LOSING MY HAIR.

dialogue.speaker: DOGBERT
dialogue.text: DON’T BE SILLY. YOU AREN’T LOSING YOUR HAIR.

dialogue.speaker: DILBERT
dialogue.text: I’M NOT? OH, GOOD.

dialogue.speaker: DOGBERT
dialogue.text: HOW COULD YOU POSSIBLY LOSE THESE HUGE CLUMPS...

dialogue.speaker: BACKGROUND CHARACTER
dialogue.text:
KNOCK
KNOCK

dialogue.speaker: BACKGROUND CHARACTER
dialogue.text:
HI. I’M FROM THE
"ORGANIZATION FOR
The PROTECTION
OF UGLY PEOPLE."

dialogue.speaker: BACKGROUND CHARACTER
dialogue.text:
WE ARE DEDICATED TO
ELIMINATING THE
STEREOTYPE OF UGLY
PEOPLE AS “SMART”
AND “NICE.”

dialogue.speaker: DILBERT
dialogue.text:
OKAY, I’LL
MAKE A
DONATION.

dialogue.speaker: BACKGROUND CHARACTER
dialogue.text:
THANKS, BUT THIS IS
A MEMBERSHIP DRIVE...

dialogue.speaker: DILBERT
dialogue.text:
I’M NEVER
GOING TO
ANSWER THE
DOOR AGAIN.

dialogue.speaker: BACKGROUND CHARACTER
dialogue.text:
DIDN’T HE RECOGNIZE
YOU AS HIS GOD?

dialogue.speaker: DILBERT
dialogue.text: ...AND WOMEN HAVE ALWAYS PLAYED HARD TO GET...

dialogue.speaker: DILBERT
dialogue.text: THEN HOW ABOUT A DATE NEXT YEAR?

dialogue.speaker: BACKGROUND CHARACTER
dialogue.text: I'D LOVE TO, BUT I DON'T HAVE A THING TO WEAR.

dialogue.speaker: DOGBERT
dialogue.text:
NORMALLY I’D
GIVE YOU SIX
MONTHS TO
LIVE.

dialogue.speaker: BACKGROUND CHARACTER
dialogue.text:
BUT WE’RE HAVING A
“50% OFF SALE” TODAY,
SO I’LL GIVE YOU A
FULL YEAR FOR THE
SAME PRICE.

dialogue.speaker: BACKGROUND CHARACTER
dialogue.text:
AND YOU GET AN
EXTRA TEN DAYS
IF YOU PAY CASH!

dialogue.speaker: DILBERT
dialogue.text:
...AND THE DOCTOR
GAVE ME JUST A
YEAR TO LIVE.

dialogue.speaker: DILBERT
dialogue.text:
I'M SORRY, LITTLE
GUY... I DON'T
KNOW HOW YOU'LL
MANAGE WITH-
OUT ME.

dialogue.speaker: DOGBERT
dialogue.text:
WOULD IT BE TOO
MUCH TROUBLE TO
PANT THE HOUSE
BEFORE YOU GO?

dialogue.speaker: DILBERT
dialogue.text:
IT SEEMS WE HAD
A MIX-UP WITH
YOUR TEST RESULTS.

dialogue.speaker: DILBERT
dialogue.text:
THEN I’M
NOT DYING?

dialogue.speaker: BACKGROUND CHARACTER
dialogue.text:
WE DOCTORS ARE
AMAZINGLY SMART,
BUT OCCASIONALLY
WE MAKE A LITTLE
ERROR.

dialogue.speaker: BACKGROUND CHARACTER
dialogue.text:
WELL…I
UNDERSTAND. BY THE WAY,
YOUR PAP
SMEAR WAS
NORMAL.

dialogue.speaker: DILBERT
dialogue.text:
BY MY CALCULATIONS,
WE CAN MAKE MILLIONS
BY COMBINING A
MORTUARY BUSINESS
AND A GARBAGE
COLLECTION BUSINESS.

dialogue.speaker: DILBERT
dialogue.text:
OUR CUSTOMERS COULD
SIMPLY LEAVE THE
DEARLY DEPARTED BY
the CURB FOR PICK-UP.

dialogue.speaker: DILBERT
dialogue.text:
MAYBE WE COULD
ADD PIZZA
DELIVERY, TOO.

dialogue.speaker: DILBERT
dialogue.text:
LET'S NOT
PUSH A GOOD
IDEA TOO FAR.

dialogue.speaker: DILBERT
dialogue.text: I HATE FANCY HOTELS LIKE THIS...

dialogue.speaker: DILBERT
dialogue.text: AM I EXPECTED TO TIP THE MAID WHEN I LEAVE?

dialogue.speaker: DILBERT
dialogue.text: I COULD ASK THAT CONCIERGE GUY...

dialogue.speaker: DILBERT
dialogue.text: CAN I TRUST A GUY WITH A FRENCH-SOUNDING JOB?

dialogue.speaker: DILBERT
dialogue.text: ...AND DO I HAVE TO TIP HIM?

dialogue.speaker: DILBERT
dialogue.text:
HA HA HA!
MY SCHEME TO
CONQUER EARTH
IS RIGHT ON
TRACK!

dialogue.speaker: DILBERT
dialogue.text:
I’VE BEEN
APPROVED FOR
A MACYS CREDIT
CARD!

dialogue.speaker: DILBERT
dialogue.text:
I’LL USE THIS
CREDIT HISTORY
TO APPLY FOR
VISA AND
MASTER CARD.

dialogue.speaker: DILBERT
dialogue.text:
SOON I’LL HAVE CREDIT
CARDS FROM EVERY
BANK IN THE WORLD.

dialogue.speaker: DILBERT
dialogue.text:
THEN I’LL DO A CASH ADVANCE
ON EVERY CARD, NETTING
BILLIONS TO FORM A WORLD-
WIDE LOTTERY PRIZE.

dialogue.speaker: DILBERT
dialogue.text:
AND EVERYBODY WHO
SUPPORTS ME AS
SUPREME RULER OF
EARTH GETS ONE FREE
LOTTERY TICKET.

dialogue.speaker: DOGBERT
dialogue.text:
YOU KNOW, MOST
DOGS WOULD BE
DELIGHTED JUST
TO GET A NICE
CHEW-TOY.

dialogue.speaker: DILBERT
dialogue.text:
I’VE DECIDED TO
WRITE DOWN ALL
OF THE SO-CALLED
“UNWRITTEN RULES.”

dialogue.speaker: DILBERT
dialogue.text:
SO FAR I HAVE “DON’T
PHONE AFTER TEN P.M.”
AND… UH…

dialogue.speaker: DILBERT
dialogue.text:
THAT’S
IT?

dialogue.speaker: DILBERT
dialogue.text:
HOW ABOUT
“DON’T THROW
PORCUPINES IN
A BALLOON
STORE”?

dialogue.speaker: BACKGROUND CHARACTER
dialogue.text: WHILE YOU WERE WASTING YOUR TIME AT WORK I

dialogue.speaker: BACKGROUND CHARACTER
dialogue.text: CAME UP WITH A MILLION DOLLAR IDEA.

dialogue.speaker: DOGBERT
dialogue.text: IT'S “MADONNA, Inc.

dialogue.speaker: BACKGROUND CHARACTER
dialogue.text: IT’S THE “MADONNA SUN TAN LOTION APPLICATOR” FOR LONELY GUYS !!

dialogue.speaker: BACKGROUND CHARACTER
dialogue.text: I’LL TAKE ONE.

dialogue.speaker: BACKGROUND CHARACTER
dialogue.text: IT LOOKS LIKE BARBIE ON A STICK, BUT IT’S MADONNA.
